members_rtbf_consistent.name: members_rtbf_consistent
members_rtbf_consistent.value: "members"."deleted_at" IS NULL OR ("members"."email" IS NULL AND "members"."display_name" IS NULL)

delegations_revoked_by_consistent.name: delegations_revoked_by_consistent
delegations_revoked_by_consistent.value: "delegations"."revoked_by_referendum_id" IS NULL OR "delegations"."revoked_at" IS NOT NULL

referenda_exactly_one_target.name: referenda_exactly_one_target
referenda_exactly_one_target.value:
(
        (CASE WHEN "referenda"."target_delegation_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "referenda"."target_decision_record_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) +
        (CASE WHEN "referenda"."target_issue_id" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      ) = 1

exchange_requests_credit_amount_consiste.name: exchange_requests_credit_amount_consistent
exchange_requests_credit_amount_consiste.value:
("exchange_requests"."mode" = 'gift' AND "exchange_requests"."credit_amount" IS NULL)
        OR
        ("exchange_requests"."mode" = 'time_credit' AND "exchange_requests"."credit_amount" IS NOT NULL)
